expected_violation.rule: session_id MUST NOT be reused after FAILED; once an adapter session_id has reached FAILED, the same session_id MUST NOT appear in any subsequent lifecycle event (PROTOCOL §2 / §7 session reuse prohibition)

note: Schema-level fields are valid (LOADING is a legal start state), but session_id sess-0051 was previously used for a session that ended in FAILED. Reusing a session_id after FAILED violates the business-layer session reuse prohibition. No hash or signature fields.

instance.reason: post-failure restart attempted to reuse session_id sess-0051
